name: Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Have 4 quarts of popped corn ready.
2. Combine 2 cups of C&H Brown Sugar, 1/2 cup water, 3 tablespoons butter, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a large kettle.
3. Cook to 246 degrees (firm-ball stage).
4. Over low heat, add 1/4 teaspoon baking soda and stir until it foams up.
5. Add popcorn; stir until well coated.
6. Spread on a floured baking sheet or kitchen table and pat lightly.
7. Let cool and harden. Enjoy with milk or apples.
